content:
# Session 63 (iter-063) тАФ review

## Metadata
- Lane: SOLO fine-grained on `AlgebraicJacobian/Picard/TensorObjInverse.lean` (Cone A bridge-3 chain).
- First substantive prover run since iter-058 (059тАУ062 were 401-auth-death, zero trajectory).
- Sorry count: **6 тЖТ 6** (no closures). Build GREEN-mod-sorry (8324 jobs), axiom-clean, no regressions.
- Targets attempted: L2 `tensorObj_left_unitor_pullback_eq_sheafify`, L3 `pullbackUnitIso_whisker_eq_sheafify_eta_whisker`, assembly `pullbackTensorMap_left_unitality`. (3a/3b NOT created as standalone lemmas.)

## Per-target

### L2 `tensorObj_left_unitor_pullback_eq_sheafify` (line 1376) тАФ PARTIAL (materially reduced)
Bare `sorry` тЖТ compiling 3-step reduction; residual = one named STU-coherence.
- `hw` (`rfl`): wrapper tensor leg `a_Y.map(forget sUI тКЧ forget pbv_M)` defeq `(tensorObjIsoOfIso sheafifyUnitIso (pullbackValIso f M)).hom`.
- `hnat`: `.hom`-form of `tensorObj_left_unitor_naturality (pullbackValIso f M)`.
- `hcomb`: split (`tensorObjIsoOfIso_eq_comp`) + `Iso.trans_hom` + `Category.assoc` in an isolated STU-free `have`, closed by `exact congrArg (_ тЙл ┬╖) hnat`.
- Failed first: `show`-restate (carrier defeq mismatch); inline `erw [hw, tensorObjIsoOfIso_eq_comp, Iso.trans_hom, Category.assoc, hnat]` (unknown ident тАФ relocated `tensorObjIsoOfIso_eq_comp` earlier тАФ then `rewrite failed: pattern not found`); `simp only [Category.assoc]; rw [hnat]` (`simp made no progress` / `rewrite failed`).
- **Residual:** `STU.hom тЙл (tensorObjIsoOfIso sheafifyUnitIso ЁЭЯЩ).hom тЙл tensorObj_left_unitor(a_Y(F M.val)).hom = a_Y.map ╬╗_{F M.val}`. Needs STU = `sheafifyTensorUnitIso` unfolded into its `asIso(a_Y.map (╬╖тЦ╖)/(тЧБ╬╖))` legs + presheaf-╬╗ / sheafification-counit naturality (B1-scale).

### L3 `pullbackUnitIso_whisker_eq_sheafify_eta_whisker` (line 1430) тАФ PARTIAL (verified first steps)
- `rw [tensorObjIsoOfIso_hom, pullbackUnitIso_eq_sheafify_eta f, Iso.refl_hom]` (both rewrites LSP-confirmed) тАФ unfolds whisker to `tensorObj_functoriality ((pbv ЁЭЯЩ).inv тЙл a_Y.map ╬╖ тЙл sheafifyUnitIso.hom) ЁЭЯЩ`. This is 3a-step-1.
- **Residual (3a-step-2 + 3b):** split by `tensorObj_functoriality_comp3` (isolated-have + term-mode fold тАФ inline `rw [тЖР...]` MISSES the seam), identify central `TF(a_Y.map ╬╖) ЁЭЯЩ` leg with `a_Y.map(╬╖ F тЦ╖ F M.val)` via the STU reconciliation (= L2's residual family), cancel flanking `(pbv ЁЭЯЩ).inv`/`sheafifyUnitIso` legs against the right wrapper.

### `pullbackTensorMap_left_unitality` (line 1504, S4b core) тАФ PARTIAL (assembly route derived, gated)
- ╬┤-expand + RHS reconciliation + `hHLU` + `erw [тЖР hHLU]` all in place from iter-058. Inspected post-`erw` goal, recorded the verbatim closing calc: cancel common leading `scp тЙл a_Y╬┤` (epi) тЖТ apply (i) L3, (ii) L2, chain. No independent math content remains.
- Gated on L2/L3 closing.

### Untouched (Cone B / telescope): S3 `dual_restrict_iso_restrict_compat` (1099), S4a `dual_unit_iso_restrict_compat` (1123), `trivialisation_restrict_compat` (1749). Deferred тАФ separate lane; `PresheafDualPullback.lean` never created.

## Supporting
- `tensorObjIsoOfIso_eq_comp` relocated (was after L2 тЖТ moved before; proof unchanged) so L2 can use it. Move only.

## Key finding / pattern (тЖТ Knowledge Base)
- **Seam split-fold idiom:** across the `SheafOfModules тЙл` defeq-not-syntactic seam, isolate split+rewrite in an STU-free `have`, then fold into the main goal term-mode via `congrArg (_ тЙл ┬╖) h` / `Eq.trans`. `rw`/`erw [h]` of a category lemma and `simp only [Category.assoc]` both MISS; `congrArg`+defeq lands. This is how L2's `hcomb` closed.
- **The shared hard core is ONE lemma:** the `sheafifyTensorUnitIso` (STU) collapse coherence тАФ the residual of BOTH L2 and L3-3a-step-2. It is NOT a tactic-idiom problem; it is missing structural content.

## Reversal signal TRIGGERED
Planner's iter-063 reversal condition: "if this fine-grained pass closes ZERO of {L2,3a,3b}, the lane is genuinely STUCK тЖТ iter-064 dispatch mathlib-analogist cross-domain on the sheaf-transport seam, then re-break." **Zero closed** (L2/L3 reduced only; 3a/3b never materialized). The seam idiom has been refined to its limit; further grinding will not produce the missing STU coherence. See recommendations.md.

## Subagent reports (this iter)
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker** (`task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-tensorobjinverse-iter063.md`): 1 major-class тАФ L2 Lean statement uses the unit-reconciled `W╬╗` wrapper, blueprint states the ╬┤-wrapper (W/W╬╗ conflation); 3a/3b `\lean{}` hints point at nonexistent Lean decls (planned, no `\leanok`, not fake); NO blueprint block isolates the STU-collapse coherence (chapter too thin to guide closure).
- **lean-auditor** (`task_results/lean-auditor-iter063.md`): file is honest тАФ all `have`s consumed, none weaken the goal, `erw`/`congrArg` folds correctly handle the documented seam, `tensorObjIsoOfIso_eq_comp` defined before use, all 6 sorries honestly scoped. One major: STALE COMMENT at `TensorObjInverse.lean:841` still calls `sheafPullbackUnit_forget_eq` "the single reduced residual" though it is now fully proved (so `tensorObj_restrict_iso_eq_pullbackTensorMap` is transitively sorry-free); 3 minor.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex`, `lem:tensorobj_left_unitor_pullback_eq_sheafify`: added `% NOTE:` тАФ Lean uses `W╬╗` wrapper, blueprint states ╬┤-wrapper (writer must restate to match).
- `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex`, `lem:pullback_unit_iso_whisker_eq_sheafify_eta_whisker_3a`: added `% NOTE:` тАФ Lean decl does not exist (inlined into L3); statement not formalizable as-stated (informal `\sim`, mislabels hard step as mechanical).
- `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex`, `lem:pullback_unit_iso_whisker_eq_sheafify_eta_whisker_3b`: added `% NOTE:` тАФ Lean decl does not exist (folded into L3 residual).
- No `\leanok` overrides (sync ran iter-063, 0/0; all sorries honest). No `\mathlibok` (no new Mathlib-backed decls). No `\lean{}` renames.

## Notes
- 117 standing `unmatched` lean_aux nodes (pre-existing coverage debt; no NEW helper added this iter тАФ `tensorObjIsoOfIso_eq_comp` is a relocation of an existing decl). Not enumerated here; standing planner debt.
- TO_USER.md was stale (referenced sorry 4тЖТ4 and a `Functor.Monoidal (pullback ╧Ж)` cone the strategy has since rejected); refreshed.
